x-enumeration-literals.name: Fixed
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rate is fixed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Forfeit
x-enumeration-literals.description: No specific repurchase rate applies to the transaction Repo, only a forfeit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Variable
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rate is variable.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Open
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rate has not been established.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Unknown
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rate is unknown by the sender or has not been established.

x-enumeration-literals.name: NilPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rate will not be paid.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AdditionalTax
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rate used for additional tax that cannot be categorised.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Charges
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rate used to calculate the amount of the charges/fees that cannot be categorised.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CashInLieuOfSecurities
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rate used to calculate the cash disbursement in lieu of a fractional quantity of, for example, equity.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Gross
x-enumeration-literals.description: Cash dividend per equity before deductions or allowances have been made.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CashIncentive
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rate of the cash premium made available if the securities holder consents or participates to an event, for example, consent fees.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Net
x-enumeration-literals.description: Relates to the netting of settlement instructions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sollication
x-enumeration-literals.description: Cash rate made available in an offer in order to encourage participation in the offer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: StampDuty
x-enumeration-literals.description: Financial instrument has not been stamped and/or duly signed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: StockExchangeTax
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rate of stock exchange tax.

x-enumeration-literals.name: WithholdingTax
x-enumeration-literals.description: Relates to a tax refund from the authorities on the associated corporate action event.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TransferTax
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transaction has been generated due to transformation following a corporate action.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TransactionTax
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rate used to calculate the amount of transaction tax.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TaxDeferred
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rate relating to the underlying security for which tax is deferred.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TaxFeeAmount
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rate relating to the underlying security which is not taxable.

x-enumeration-literals.name: WithholdingOfForeignTax
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rate at which the income will be withheld by the jurisdiction in which the income was originally paid, for which relief at source and/or reclaim may be possible.

x-enumeration-literals.name: WithholdingOfLocalTax
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rate at which the income will be withheld by the jurisdiction in which the account owner is located, for which relief at source and/or reclaim may be possible.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Imputed
x-enumeration-literals.description: Imputed tax.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Precompte
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rate is a precompte.

x-enumeration-literals.name: OneTierTax
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rate is a one tier tax.

x-enumeration-literals.name: LocalTax
x-enumeration-literals.description: Interest liable for interest down payment tax (proportion of gross interest per unit/interim profits that is not covered by the credit in the interest pool).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Scheduled
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rate of the scheduled payment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Unscheduled
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rate of the unscheduled payment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AnyAndAll
x-enumeration-literals.description: Any and all rate is sought.
